name: Buffalo Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Use spoonfuls of the dough to form cookies on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake for 12 to 14 minutes, or until edges are lightly golden.
5. Remove from oven and allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
6. Makes approximately 4 dozen cookies. These freeze well.
